---
title: "Projects"
---

# Projects

Below are a few projects that showcase my work. For each project, aim for:
- **What question you asked**
- **What data you used**
- **What methods you used**
- **What you found**
- **A link to code / report**

---

## Project 1 — Title (Course / Personal / Internship)

**Goal:** (1–2 sentences)  
**Data:** (source, size, key variables)  
**Methods:** (e.g., regression, clustering, classification, visualization)  
**Key result:** (1–2 sentences)  
**Link:** GitHub repo / report (optional)

### Example visualization (optional)
```{r}
# Optional: include a quick plot if you want.
# If you don't want code on your website yet, delete this chunk.

library(ggplot2)

ggplot(mpg, aes(displ, hwy)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Example plot (replace with your own)",
    x = "Engine displacement",
    y = "Highway MPG"
  )
